title: filago lusitanica
intro: Filago lusitanica, also known as Lusitanian fleabane, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, inflammation, and skin conditions due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Filago lusitanica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
